nasb.text: ‘Then the land will enjoy its sabbaths all the days of the desolation, while you are in your enemies’ land; then the land will rest and enjoy its sabbaths.

esv.text: “Then the land shall enjoy its Sabbaths as long as it lies desolate, while you are in your enemies’ land; then the land shall rest, and enjoy its Sabbaths.

cnv.text: “當那地荒涼，你們又住在仇敵之地的時候，地就享受安息；那地要休歇，享受安息。

ccb.text: 你们被掳到敌国的时候，你们的土地将荒废，享受安息。
